content:
# AIPage

类型标识: type = "page"

## 描述

页面，是节点的顶层容器。每个页面有独立的尺寸和背景色，包含一组节点（nodes）。一个应用由多个页面组成。

## 属性列表

- **id** (string) [必填]
- **name** (string) [必填] 默认值: "页面"
- **width** (number) [必填] 默认值: 375
- **height** (number) [必填] 默认值: 812
- **backgroundColor** (string | string | "transparent") [必填] 默认值: "#ffffff"
- **nodes** (Array<{ id: string; name: string; transform: { position: { x: number; y: number }; size: { width: number; height: number }; rotation: number; opacity: number }; zIndex: number; locked: boolean; type: "rect"; fill: { type: "solid"; color: string | string | "transparent" } | { type: "gradient"; direction: "horizontal" | "vertical" | "diagonal"; stops: Array<{ offset: number; color: string | string | "transparent" }> } | { type: "none" }; stroke: { color: string | string | "transparent"; width: number; style: "solid" | "dashed" | "dotted" }; cornerRadius: number } | { id: string; name: string; transform: { position: { x: number; y: number }; size: { width: number; height: number }; rotation: number; opacity: number }; zIndex: number; locked: boolean; type: "text"; content: string; style: { fontSize: number; fontWeight: "normal" | "bold"; color: string | string | "transparent"; align: "left" | "center" | "right"; lineHeight: number } } | { id: string; name: string; transform: { position: { x: number; y: number }; size: { width: number; height: number }; rotation: number; opacity: number }; zIndex: number; locked: boolean; type: "image"; src: string; objectFit: "fill" | "contain" | "cover" } | { id: string; name: string; transform: { position: { x: number; y: number }; size: { width: number; height: number }; rotation: number; opacity: number }; zIndex: number; locked: boolean; type: "cubic_bezier"; controlPoints: [{ x: number; y: number }, { x: number; y: number }, { x: number; y: number }, { x: number; y: number }]; stroke: { color: string | string | "transparent"; width: number; style: "solid" | "dashed" | "dotted" } } | { id: string; name: string; transform: { position: { x: number; y: number }; size: { width: number; height: number }; rotation: number; opacity: number }; zIndex: number; locked: boolean; type: "quadratic_bezier"; controlPoints: [{ x: number; y: number }, { x: number; y: number }, { x: number; y: number }]; stroke: { color: string | string | "transparent"; width: number; style: "solid" | "dashed" | "dotted" } } | { id: string; name: string; transform: { position: { x: number; y: number }; size: { width: number; height: number }; rotation: number; opacity: number }; zIndex: number; locked: boolean; type: "group"; children: Array<AINode (recursive)> }>) [必填]

## 最小可用示例

```json
{
  "id": "page-001",
  "name": "首页",
  "width": 375,
  "height": 812,
  "backgroundColor": "#ffffff",
  "nodes": []
}
```
